ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Mar-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Martin for Terresita Alston.

Mr. Martin requested a 30-day continuance stating that he now has the final statements and that he could do an Inventory and Appraisal. The matter was continued to March 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Jan-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Martin for Terresita Alston (Personal Representative).

Mr. Martin stated that this was a no-asset estate and that the Personal Representative finally e mailed the information. The matter was continued to January 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Inventory and Appraisal, and for status of the Petition for Final Distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Martin for Terresita Alston.

Mr. Martin stated that this was a very insolvent estate, that there was no real property, that there was an account that had a named Beneficiary and that the funds went to the Beneficiary's Heirs. In addition, Mr. Martin provided information on the other accounts and stated that $15,000.00 went to the credit card. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that a petition to close the estate for lack of assets was needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
